This metadata relates to the overall sampling event at object level, ie all samples taken at one time rather than individual samples. The purpose of this separate category in addition to ‘sample taking’ is to avoid having to copy/paste general info at the individual sample level.

This metadata relates to a high-level grouping used to associate multiple sampling events carried out within the same research, conservation, catalogue, exhibition, or documentation context. The purpose of this category is to record shared contextual information without repeating it at the sampling event or individual sample level.

This metadata relates to individual samples taken within an overall sampling event. The purpose of this separate category is to avoid having to copy/paste more general info at the individual sample level
